title: 10 reasons why Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma rejected Arvind Kejriwal's recusal plea
description: Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma of the Delhi High Court on Monday rejected the plea filed by Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) chief Arvind Kejriwal and others seeking her recusal from the Delhi Excise Policy case.In a strongly worded judgment, Justice Sharma rejected allegations of bias on her part.Below are the ten grounds, among others, on which she rejected the plea seeking her recusal.1.
